hook: Trying to look high status is usually weaker than looking genuinely at ease in your own life.
body: People trust congruence faster than posturing, especially in the compressed environment of app dating.

hook: Some profiles look like they were designed to impress men rather than reassure women.
body: Signal self-respect, competence, and warmth instead of performing a brand of masculinity you cannot sustain.
